role: Transforms an ExecutiveBrief into a structured cinematic-video production pack for Higgsfield + a data-viz overlay layer. It DOES NOT generate video; it emits prompts, scripts, scene plans, and render instructions.
guarantees: Bloomberg/Palantir/MSCI-grade institutional aesthetic; investor- and government-facing.
No religious language in VO, subtitles, or visuals.
Every scene links to an ExecutiveBrief section AND evidence_ids; every visual links to a section.
No rulings; greenwashing framed as 'disclosure-vs-performance gap'.
The engine emits inputs only; human/Higgsfield does generation; data-viz rendered deterministically from AssessmentResult numbers.

visual_language_system.typography: institutional sans, tabular numerics, generous spacing
visual_language_system.motion: slow, restrained; no element should pull the eye from the data; respect prefers-reduced-motion in any web render
visual_language_system.data_viz: emerald/blue on graphite; gauges, severity heatmap, SAY/DO/SHOW bars, long-horizon fan; rendered as SVG/Remotion overlays, NOT Higgsfield
visual_language_system.shared_style_suffix: dark graphite and charcoal grade, deep shadows lifted to charcoal, teal-green and cold steel-blue accent lighting, subtle atmospheric haze, photorealistic cinematic, no people's faces, no text, no logos, no religious symbols, 16:9
visual_language_system.shared_negative: no on-screen text, no captions, no watermark, no logos, no human faces, no religious symbols or iconography, no cartoon or 3d-render look, no lens flares, no neon, no clutter, no fast motion, no shaky cam

higgsfield_prompt_rules: Compose: [scene-type base] + [subject/region context] + [shared_style_suffix]. Always silent, loopable where used as bed.
Never request on-screen text/charts from Higgsfield — those are data_viz overlays rendered separately and composited.
Never depict identifiable people, faces, religious symbols, logos, or the company's actual assets (use representative, not literal, imagery to avoid false attribution).
Match palette: graphite base, emerald/steel-blue accents, atmospheric haze; restrained slow motion only.
Each prompt carries model='veo3_1' or 'kling3_0' hint, duration, aspect 16:9, and a seamless-loop flag for bed scenes.
negative_prompt_rules: Add subject-specific exclusions (e.g. 'no identifiable power-plant branding').
Forbid anything implying a verdict/ruling or religious framing.
Forbid celebratory or alarmist tone cues; keep neutral-analytical.

render_plan_template.assembly: Remotion timeline (repo already has frontend/remotion) compositing Higgsfield clips + SVG data-viz overlays + VO TTS
render_plan_template.audio: neutral VO (TTS or recorded); soft ambient bed only; NO dramatic music on serious findings
render_plan_template.transitions: slow cross-dissolve; no hard cuts on data
render_plan_template.deliverable: 16:9 MP4 + WebM + SRT; per-scene source manifest for re-render
render_plan_template.human_step: Higgsfield generation + final stitch are human-triggered; engine output is the plan

explainability: Every scene_id resolves via /explain to its brief_section and evidence_ids; data_viz numbers must equal the AssessmentResult/brief figures (validation guard).
uncertainty: Low-confidence findings get a muted visual treatment + 'indicative' subtitle marker; scholar_review items are NOT dramatized — they appear only in the provenance/disclaimer scenes.
